mano_cua.result_summary: 在 Chrome 中测试最小化→恢复→空格键流程：空格键未再次最小化窗口，但焦点落在导航按钮上激活了该按钮而非触发播放/暂停。此 bug 是 Electron 窗口级行为，Chrome 浏览器中无法完全复现原始 Electron 最小化场景。音乐内容区域为空（API 数据未加载）。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Space key after minimize/restore: Did NOT minimize the window again (window remained open). Did NOT trigger music play/pause. DID activate the focused home navigation button (showed blue focus outline). The Space was captured by the focused UI element rather than playing/pausing music. This could be either expected behavior or a focus management bug after restore. Music content sections were empty - no music content loaded.
